service.hardwareDesc: Motherboard, GPU, PSU, and component-level repairs with precision diagnostics.
service.laptopDesc: Screen replacements, keyboard fixes, thermal repaste, and full system overhauls.
service.virusDesc: Deep clean infections, remove ransomware, and secure your system.
service.dataDesc: Recover lost files from dead drives, corrupted media, and accidental deletion.
service.performanceDesc: SSD upgrades, RAM expansion, OS optimization — make your PC fly again.
service.networkDesc: WiFi troubleshooting, home network configuration, and secure remote access.
